zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma Maunsell於大約1223年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Walter Maunsell44歲，母親Hawisia de Somery63歲。她於大約1240年與Alard le Fleming II在英國英格蘭素可普爾波洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1303年在英國格盧斯特斯爾薩培頓享年81歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma Maunsell于大约1223年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Walter Maunsell44岁，母亲Hawisia de Somery63岁。她于大约1240年与Alard le Fleming II在英国英格兰素可普爾波洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1303年在英国格盧斯特斯爾薩培頓享年81岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Maunsell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma Maunsell was born about 1223, in Sussex, England, her father, Walter Maunsell, was 44 and her mother, Hawisia de Somery, was 63. She married Alard le Fleming II about 1240, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1303, in Sapperton, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma Maunsell est née environ 1223, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Walter Maunsell, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Hawisia de Somery, avait 63 ans. Elle a épousé Alard le Fleming II environ 1240, à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1303, à Sapperton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma Maunsell um 1223 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Maunsell 44 und ihre Mutter Hawisia de Somery 63. Sie hat um 1240 in Pulborough, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Alard le Fleming II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1303 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Sapperton, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Maunsell è nata il circa 1223 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Walter Maunsell, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Hawisia de Somery, aveva 63 anni. Lei sposato Alard le Fleming II circa 1240, nel Pulborough, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1303, nel Sapperton, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma Maunsellが約1223年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Walter Maunsellは44歳，母Hawisia de Someryは63歳であった。約1240年にイギリスイギリススセックスプウルボロウでAlard le Fleming IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1303年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアサップエルトンで81歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Maunsell(이)가 대략 1223년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Maunsell(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawisia de Somery(은)는 63세였다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 풀버루그h에서 Alard le Fleming II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1303년 영국 그루스스터실르 사퍼턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Maunsell nasceu aproximadamente 1223, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Maunsell, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Hawisia de Somery, tinha 63 anos. Ela casou-se com Alard le Fleming II aproximadamente 1240, em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1303, em Sapperton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma Maunsell родилась около 1223 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Maunsell было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Hawisia de Somery, 63. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alard le Fleming II около 1240 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1303 г. в местности саппиртон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma Maunsell nació aproximadamente 1223, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Maunsell, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Hawisia de Somery, tenía 63 años. Se casó con Alard le Fleming II aproximadamente 1240, en Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1303, en Sapperton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
